Narrative: The Khavda Renewable Energy Park has successfully produced 17560871.7 MW of renewable energy over the reporting period.
Operations experienced 4 high-risk weather days, resulting in potential generation losses.
The facility continues to drive massive decarbonization, avoiding 83519505.85 Tons of CO2 equivalent emissions.
AI-driven forecasting models remain accurate with an average predictive error of 4.04%.
Dynamic predictive models indicate a generally favorable operating environment, with isolated generation drops correlated strictly to transient cloud cover and heavy rainfall.
